message:
fix(channel/watch): clean up waiter list entry on ChangedFuture drop even when queued flag already cleared

The post-register fast paths in Receiver::poll_changed can clear the
waiter's queued AtomicBool when a value arrives (or the sender is
dropped) between registration and the future observing the update.
When the future is then dropped, the old Drop impl only walked the
waiters list if waiter.load(Acquire) was still true, so a
queued == false entry whose Arc<AtomicBool> was still linked from the
shared waiters vec would leak until the next registration compacted it.

The fix: also take the Drop cleanup path when the waiter's strong
count is still > 1 (meaning the shared list still holds a reference to
our entry). In that case we force queued to false and retain-filter
the waiters list so our entry is removed, matching the invariant that
a completed/cancelled future never leaves a dangling waiter behind.

Adds a regression test (completed_future_drop_cleans_false_flag_waiter_entry)
that reproduces the exact state: a manually-registered WatchWaiter
with queued = false plus a ChangedFuture { completed: true }, and
asserts drop removes the stale entry without spuriously waking it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
